title: Tool
description: A concrete tool used to obtain evidence — more specific than a technique. Provenance.tools entries reference these ids to record WHAT TOOLS produced a fact.

id.description: Stable tool id; matches the file name.

version.description: Version or version range used/observed, if relevant.

techniques.description: Technique ids this tool supports (must be in the fixed technique set).

maintainer.description: Contributor id of the tool's maintainer, if any (must match spec/contributors/).
